name: managed-switcher-backend
description: Managed Claude Account Switcher — backend core (auth, entitlements, field encryption, tamper-evident audit).
comment: mongodb + nodemailer are lazy-required only inside their real-implementation factories (mongoRepo.js, mailer.js) and are NOT needed to run `node --test` (the suite uses the in-memory repo + a capture-fake mailer). Ed25519 JWTs use Node's built-in crypto (no `jose`) so the full test suite runs offline with nothing installed.
